code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut idx = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        if idx % 2 == 0
          if first
            out = token
            first = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{token}"
          end
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    if idx % 2 == 0
      if first
        out = token
      else
        out = "#{out} #{token}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
